name: orbit-wars-platform
description: Human and agent-controlled orbital fleet competition platform.

scripts.bootstrap:python: python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && .venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
scripts.db:upgrade: sh scripts/python.sh -m alembic -c services/api/alembic.ini upgrade head
scripts.format: prettier --write . && sh scripts/python.sh -m ruff format services packages/orbit-engine-py
scripts.format:check: prettier --check . && sh scripts/python.sh -m ruff format --check services packages/orbit-engine-py
scripts.lint:python: sh scripts/python.sh -m ruff check services packages/orbit-engine-py
scripts.typecheck:python: sh scripts/python.sh -m mypy services/api/orbit_api services/match-worker/orbit_match_worker services/agent-sandbox/orbit_agent_sandbox packages/orbit-engine-py/orbit_engine packages/platform-runtime-py/orbit_runtime packages/contracts/orbit_contracts
scripts.check: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
